title: pentzia pilulifera
intro: Pentzia pilulifera, also known as the "Ebine" or "Wild Sage", is a perennial shrub native to the tropical regions of South Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pentzia pilulifera include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of asthma and bronchitis. Pentzia pilulifera can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
